mentions.note: Steel backlog full with strong pricing and tight production schedules; emblematic of healthy manufacturing economy. Hot-rolled steel unchanged over 5 years despite tariff noise.
Steel company doing better than no-tariff scenario but worse than Nucor; needs economic activity to improve; lower rates could help but current headwinds discouraging.
Too risky; if you don't know what asset manager owns you don't want to buy; can't find out what it's got inside.
Caller held outsized position; Cramer prefers Nucor as superior operator. No specific sell but Nucor better-positioned in steel.
